text:
Created attachment 260100
WAAgent Log File

This is the waaagent.log file.  I checked 'top -P' again and both CPUs are showing 100% idle.  In the previous comment with the results of 'top -P' you can see 'python3.11' which runs waagent has the most CPU time but pales in comparison to total uptime and does not reflect the load showing in the Azure metrics.
